title: LSC 6.0: Unified Curvature-Coupled Neutrino Model
description: LSC 6.0 is a phenomenological neutrino model repository connected to the LSC publication line. It presents a curvature-coupled energy-reconstruction framework for the Gallium anomaly, links to the LSC 6.0 Zenodo working paper, and includes theory notes, release files, version history, and a toy simulation.
